title: 10 Pack Ratchet Tie Down Strap, 6m Heavy Duty Ratchet Straps, Tensioning Belts with Adjustable Lashing Straps Tensile Strength 800 kg, for Trucks, Motorbikes, Securing Cargo or Luggage, Black
features: 🔲【PREMIUM MATERIAL】The ratchet belt is made of 100% high quality polyester. High strength polyester webbing is sun resistant and anti-corrosion, weatherproof, long service life.The breaking strength up to 1700 lbs / 800 kg.

🔲【STRONG AND LONG】 The ratchet tie down ratchet belt has a firm weaving, which enable the belts to be strong and tough.6M/20 FT length and 1 inch width, which is a suitable size for you to tie down your motorcycle, bundle the goods, and transport luggage in daily life and work. 10 ratchet belts in one package, which is convenient and cost-effective for you to buy in bulks.

🔲【ENDLESS BELTS】 There is no hook on the end of the ratchet belt. The advantage of endless ratchet belt is that it can easily fit through the area where the belts with hooks could not fit. The no hook design also prevent your car from being scratched by the metal hook.

🔲【EASY TO USE】 The ratchet belts can be opened and tightened in a flash thanks to the robust ratchet. Once tightened, the tension belt can only be opened by loosening the ratchet. Note that tensioner releases tensiont：Push spring loaded retaining lock and simultaneously pull on strap.

🔲【QUALITY SERVICE】 For many years we have been concentrating on professional load and transport securing products. If you have any question after receiving our product, please feel free to contact us. We are glad to help you solve the problem!
